Name: TicoFat
Notes: A bigger Luma that requests a certain number of Star Bits. If the player feeds them the requested amount, it will transform, disappear and activate a switch. If the player has fed it all the Star Bits before and Obj_arg7 is not -1, it will disappear immediately and activate the switch. There should only be one per stage. When it transforms, it tries to move on a path, however, this is optional. Despite there only being 7 instances of TicoFat in SMG1, the game's save data can handle more.

Obj_arg0.Name: Broken Item Type
Obj_arg0.Description: The item that spawns upon feeding the Luma. This can freeze the game, for some reason.

Obj_arg1.Name: Requested Star Bits
Obj_arg1.Description: The number of requested Star Bits. Default is 10.

Obj_arg2.Name: Skip First Dialogue?
Obj_arg2.Description: If set, the first message will be skipped, meaning the player can feed the Luma right away.

Obj_arg4.Name: Transforming Speed
Obj_arg4.Description: The speed the Luma travels when transforming.

Obj_arg7.Name: Save Data
Obj_arg7.Description: The save data slot that keeps track of the number of star bits fed. Setting this to -1 will make the Hungry Luma respawn every time.

Rail.Description: The path that it can move on after eating the player's Star Bits.
